items.title: Java News Roundup: JDK 27 Release Schedule, Hibernate, LangChain4j, Keycloak, Helidon, Junie CLI
items.summaryShort: Java News Roundup: JDK 27 Release Schedule, Hibernate, LangChain4j, Keycloak, Helidon, Junie CLI. This week's Java roundup for April 6th, 2026, features news highlighting: the fifth preview of Primitive Types in Patterns, instanceof and swi

items.title: GitHub Copilot CLI Reaches General Availability
items.summaryShort: GitHub Copilot CLI Reaches General Availability. GitHub has launched Copilot CLI into general availability, bringing generative AI directly to the terminal.

items.title: Etsy Migrates 1000-Shard, 425 TB MySQL Sharding Architecture to Vitess
items.summaryShort: Etsy Migrates 1000-Shard, 425 TB MySQL Sharding Architecture to Vitess. The Etsy engineering team recently described how the company migrated its long-running MySQL sharding infrastructure to Vitess.

items.title: Presentation: Latency: the Race to Zero...Are We There Yet?
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Latency: the Race to Zero...Are We There Yet?. Amir Langer discusses the evolution of latency reduction, from the Pony Express to modern hardware.

items.title: CNCF and Kusari Partner to Strengthen Software Supply Chain Security across Cloud-Native Projects
items.summaryShort: CNCF and Kusari Partner to Strengthen Software Supply Chain Security across Cloud-Native Projects. The Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) and Kusari have announced a new collaboration aimed at strengthening software supply chain secur

items.title: Trump officials may be encouraging banks to test Anthropic’s Mythos model
items.summaryShort: Trump officials may be encouraging banks to test Anthropic’s Mythos model. The report is particularly surprising since the Department of Defense recently declared Anthropic a supply-chain risk.

items.title: Apple reportedly testing four designs for upcoming smart glasses
items.summaryShort: Apple reportedly testing four designs for upcoming smart glasses. These glasses are a step back from an ambitious plan that once called for Apple to launch a variety of mixed and augmented reality devices.

items.title: X says it’s reducing payments to clickbait accounts
items.summaryShort: X says it’s reducing payments to clickbait accounts. X is cutting back on payments to accounts that are “flooding the timeline” with clickbait and rapid-fire news aggregation, according to its head of product Nikita Bier
